symbols: manger scene — the humble birth of the King of kings
description: A detail from a Nativity scene (Presepio) by Perugino showing figures gathered around the infant Christ in a manger setting, rendered in the artist's characteristic soft, luminous style.
theological_description: The Presepio (Nativity, LUK.2.1-7) depicts the birth of Christ in Bethlehem. The eternal Son 'emptied himself, by taking the form of a servant, being born in the likeness of men' (PHP.2.7).

scripture_refs.reason: Christ emptying himself, taking the form of a servant
